query: SELECT COUNT(*) as niche_count FROM products WHERE badges LIKE '%niche%'; SELECT prefecture, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM products WHERE badges LIKE '%niche%' GROUP BY prefecture ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 15;
